parameters.query: INSERT INTO ingest_runs (source, status, metadata) VALUES ('federal:sam:api', 'running', '{"workflow":"02-sam-api-delta"}'::jsonb) RETURNING id;

UPDATE ingest_runs SET status = 'success', finished_at = NOW(), rows_processed = {{ $('Fetch SAM API Pages').first().json.count }}, metadata = metadata || jsonb_build_object('filtered', {{ $('Map and Filter Records').all().length }}) WHERE id = {{ $('Start Ingest Run').first().json.id }};
UPDATE ingest_runs SET status = 'failed', finished_at = NOW(), error_message = 'SAM_API_KEY not set' WHERE id = {{ $('Start Ingest Run').first().json.id }};
